title: KLISS Modernization Project Steering Committee Report

events.description: KLISS Modernization Project Steering Committee recommended production deployment of KLISS bill drafting system after 2025 legislative session.
Contract executed to be completed by June 30, 2025.

evidence.quote: A session-ready system will be deployed before October 1, 2025.
evidence.note: Production deployment delayed due to required functionality not yet ready.
